items.scenario: You recently signed up for a weekend pottery workshop offered by the community arts center. The confirmation email did not mention what materials to bring or where the studio is located, so you want to be fully prepared.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Delgado. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain which workshop session you registered for
Ask what supplies you should bring
Describe the kind of project you hope to make
items.subject: Preparing for the weekend pottery workshop

items.scenario: You are planning a weekend hiking trip with a friend for the long holiday in October. You found a national park with cabins, but the cabins book up quickly and you need to decide on dates soon.
items.direction: Write an email to Nadia. In your email, do the following:
goals: Suggest which weekend works best for the trip
Describe the park and cabins you found
Ask whether she can share the cost
items.subject: Cabin dates for our October hiking trip

items.scenario: You subscribed to a monthly meal-kit delivery service three months ago. This week's box arrived a day late and was missing two of the recipe ingredients you had ordered. You want the issue resolved before the next delivery.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Foster. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe what went wrong with the delivery
Explain how the missing items affected you
Ask how the company will make things right
items.subject: Late box and missing ingredients

items.scenario: You have lived in your apartment building for a year. For the past three days the hot water in your unit has run cold every morning, though your neighbors say theirs works fine. You need it fixed before the weekend.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Alvarez. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the problem with the hot water
Suggest a time for someone to inspect your unit
items.subject: No hot water in my unit
